framework.name: Energy and Transport Cybersecurity Requirements
framework.issuing_body: Energiavirasto / Vaylavirasto / HVK / LVM / Suomen Pankki
framework.scope: Cybersecurity requirements for Finnish energy sector (Energiavirasto), transport infrastructure (Vaylavirasto), national emergency supply (HVK), transport ministry cyber strategy (LVM), and central bank requirements (Suomen Pankki / ECB). Covers SCADA/ICS protection, smart grid security, transport system security, and payment system resilience.
framework.structure_description: Organized by authority: Energiavirasto (energy), Vaylavirasto (transport infrastructure), HVK (emergency supply), LVM (cyber strategy), Suomen Pankki (payment systems).

controls.title: Energy sector cybersecurity management
controls.description_nl: Energiasektorin toimijan on toteutettava kyberturvallisuuden hallintajarjestelma, joka kattaa sahkoverkkojen ja kaasuverkkojen turvaamisen.
controls.description: An energy sector entity shall implement a cybersecurity management system covering protection of electricity and gas networks.

controls.title: Electricity grid control system protection
controls.description_nl: Sahkoverkon SCADA- ja EMS-jarjestelmat on eristettava toimistoverkosta ja suojattava luvattomalta paasylta.
controls.description: Electricity grid SCADA and EMS systems shall be isolated from the office network and protected against unauthorized access.

controls.title: Energy system patch management
controls.description_nl: Energiajarjestelmien tietoturvapaivitykset on testattava erillisessa testiymparistossa ennen tuotantoymparistoon asennusta.
controls.description: Energy system security patches shall be tested in a separate test environment before production installation.

controls.title: Energy sector incident communication
controls.description_nl: Merkittavista tietoturvahairiotilanteista on ilmoitettava Energiavirastolle ja Fingridille. Sahkon toimitusvarmuuteen vaikuttavat hairiot on raportoitava valittomasti.
controls.description: Significant security incidents shall be reported to the Energy Authority and Fingrid. Disruptions affecting electricity supply reliability shall be reported immediately.

controls.title: Electricity grid continuity management
controls.description_nl: Sahkoverkon toimijoiden on laadittava jatkuvuussuunnitelma kyberturvallisuuspoikkeamien varalle. Suunnitelma on testattava vuosittain.
controls.description: Electricity grid operators shall prepare a continuity plan for cybersecurity incidents. The plan shall be tested annually.

controls.title: Smart grid security
controls.description_nl: Alykkaan sahkoverkon komponenttien (alykkaat mittarit, keskittimet) tietoturva on varmistettava. Tiedonsiirto on salattava ja laitteiden eheys on tarkistettava.
controls.description: Security of smart grid components (smart meters, concentrators) shall be ensured. Data transfer shall be encrypted and device integrity verified.

controls.title: Supply chain security in energy sector
controls.description_nl: Energiasektorin kriittisten komponenttien ja ohjelmistojen toimitusketjun turvallisuus on arvioitava.
controls.description: Supply chain security of critical energy sector components and software shall be assessed.

controls.title: Energy sector personnel security
controls.description_nl: Kriittisten energiajarjestelmien yllapitohenkiloston taustat on tarkistettava ja heille on jarjestettava kyberturvallisuuskoulutusta.
controls.description: Background checks shall be conducted for critical energy system maintenance personnel and cybersecurity training provided.

controls.title: Transport system cybersecurity management
controls.description_nl: Liikennejarjestelmien kyberturvallisuus on hallittava osana liikenneturvallisuutta. Kyberriskit on sisallytettava riskienhallintaan.
controls.description: Transport system cybersecurity shall be managed as part of transport safety. Cyber risks shall be included in risk management.

controls.title: Railway control system protection
controls.description_nl: Rataverkon ohjaus- ja turvalaitejarjestelmien kyberturvallisuus on varmistettava. Jarjestelmat on eristettava julkisesta verkosta.
controls.description: Cybersecurity of railway control and safety systems shall be ensured. Systems shall be isolated from public networks.

controls.title: Road traffic control system security
controls.description_nl: Tieliikenteen ohjausjarjestelmien (liikennevalot, muuttuvat opasteet) kyberturvallisuus on varmistettava.
controls.description: Cybersecurity of road traffic control systems (traffic lights, variable message signs) shall be ensured.

controls.title: Maritime traffic safety system protection
controls.description_nl: VTS-jarjestelmien (Vessel Traffic Service) ja AIS-jarjestelmien (Automatic Identification System) kyberturvallisuus on varmistettava.
controls.description: Cybersecurity of VTS (Vessel Traffic Service) and AIS (Automatic Identification System) systems shall be ensured.

controls.title: Transport automation security
controls.description_nl: Liikenteen automaatiojarjestelmien (autonominen liikenne, yhteistoiminnalliset jarjestelmat) kyberturvallisuus on arvioitava.
controls.description: Cybersecurity of transport automation systems (autonomous transport, cooperative systems) shall be assessed.

controls.title: Security supply critical system protection
controls.description_nl: Huoltovarmuuskriittisten tietojarjestelmien ja tietoverkkojen kyberturvallisuus on varmistettava erityistoimenpitein.
controls.description: Cybersecurity of security-of-supply-critical information systems and networks shall be ensured with special measures.

controls.title: Cyber exercises
controls.description_nl: Huoltovarmuuskriittisten toimijoiden on osallistuttava kansallisiin kyberharjoituksiin (KYHA) valmiutensa testaamiseksi.
controls.description: Security-of-supply-critical entities shall participate in national cyber exercises (KYHA) to test their readiness.

controls.title: Critical infrastructure preparedness
controls.description_nl: Kriittisen infrastruktuurin yllapitajien on varauduttava pitkakestoisiin kyberhairiotilanteisiin varatietojarjestelmilla ja manuaalisilla toimintatavoilla.
controls.description: Critical infrastructure operators shall prepare for prolonged cyber disruptions with backup systems and manual procedures.

controls.title: Sector-specific cybersecurity requirements
controls.description_nl: Huoltovarmuuskeskus maarittelee toimialakohtaisia kyberturvallisuusvaatimuksia yhteistyossa sektoritoimijoiden kanssa.
controls.description: The National Emergency Supply Agency defines sector-specific cybersecurity requirements in collaboration with sector entities.

controls.title: Cyber strategy implementation
controls.description_nl: Liikenne- ja viestintaministeriolla on kyberturvallisuusstrategia, jonka toimeenpanoa valvotaan. Strategia kattaa viestintaverkot, liikennejarjestelmat ja digitaaliset palvelut.
controls.description: The Ministry of Transport and Communications has a cybersecurity strategy whose implementation is monitored. The strategy covers communications networks, transport systems, and digital services.

controls.title: International cybersecurity cooperation
controls.description_nl: Suomi osallistuu kansainvaliseen kyberturvallisuusyhteistyohon EU:n, NATOn ja pohjoismaisen yhteistyon kautta.
controls.description: Finland participates in international cybersecurity cooperation through the EU, NATO, and Nordic cooperation.

controls.title: Payment system cybersecurity
controls.description_nl: Maksujarjestelmien yllapitajien on toteutettava ECB:n CROE-kehikon (Cyber Resilience Oversight Expectations) mukaiset kyberturvallisuustoimenpiteet.
controls.description: Payment system operators shall implement cybersecurity measures according to the ECB CROE (Cyber Resilience Oversight Expectations) framework.

controls.title: TIBER-FI testing
controls.description_nl: Merkittavien finanssialan toimijoiden on suoritettava TIBER-FI-kehikon mukainen uhkajohtoinen penetraatiotestaus.
controls.description: Significant financial sector entities shall conduct threat-led penetration testing according to the TIBER-FI framework.

controls.title: Payment system continuity management
controls.description_nl: Maksujarjestelmien jatkuvuussuunnitelmien on varmistettava maksamisen jatkuvuus myos merkittavien kyberpoikkeamien aikana.
controls.description: Payment system continuity plans shall ensure payment continuity even during significant cyber incidents.
